name: Restart After Pause
logic: Reduce volume/intensity after a break before returning to benchmark loads.
coachNote: First workout back should not chase previous PR-level effort.

name: Progress by Readiness
logic: Use previous successful loads as reference, but only progress when technique and recovery are good.

name: Animal Flow Sequencing
logic: Progress from wrist prep -> activation -> transitions -> linked flow.
coachNote: Do not rush advanced flow transitions.
coachNotes: master base positions before advanced transitions
tempo control is a progression tool
beginnerInstructions: use slow reps before chaining movements together

name: Quality Before Volume
logic: Stop adding exercises once useful work is done.
coachNote: Extra chest or random volume is not automatically better.

name: Shoulder Protection
logic: Reduce load or range if shoulder pain appears.
coachNote: Shoulder stacking matters in both pressing and kickthroughs.
